race.comment: Hard race to close the program. TOES IN THE WATER (10) was back in the winner's circle last start at the fourth run of the campaign, leading for the judge and just hanging on over today's trip at Hawkesbury. Continues to improve with racing this prep and she should give them a tough bunny to catch again. AUTUMN DREAM (2) scored two back at Warwick Farm then was disappointing over 1550m at the Kensington track last time. Hard to find a reason for that performance. Draws well and is more than capable of testing this field on his regular form. SHANGRI LA IMPACT (4) started favourite and led from the outset when resuming over a mile at Kembla 39 days ago. That was his first run under Tom Charlton. Honest mare who is sure to be competitive again. VIA FLAMINIA (12) flopped at Wyong last time but has won two from three at this track so she can bounce back without surprising. COSMIC AVENGER (6) scored over 1500m here two back and is in the mix again.
